page_metadata.biotools__summary: HyperEx (pronounced "Hyper Ex" for Hypervariable region Extractor) is a tool that extracts 16S ribosomal RNA (rRNA) hypervariable region based on a set of primers.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: HyperEx (pronounced "Hyper Ex" for Hypervariable region Extractor) is a tool that extracts 16S ribosomal RNA (rRNA) hypervariable region based on a set of primers.
